hooks.command: CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[^&;|"]*[[:space:]]push[^&;|]*(--force|[[:space:]]-[A-Za-z]*f|[[:space:]]\+)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git force-push is not allowed — regular pushes are fine; do not rewrite published history' >&2; exit 2; fi
